headline: Is Targa Resources (TRGP) Undervalued Following Its Board Update And Dividend Declaration?
summary: Targa Resources (TRGP) is back in focus after its board appointed former ConocoPhillips executive Thomas Mathiasmeier as a Class II director and Audit Committee member, following a fresh quarterly dividend declaration. See our latest analysis for Targa Resources. The recent board appointment and dividend declaration come as Targa Resources’ share price shows firm momentum, with a 30-day share price return of 7.54% and a year-to-date gain of 52.30%, while the 5-year total shareholder return of...
